About SolanaLite

SolanaLite is a platform with features for earning income built on the Solana blockchain. One decentralized and permissionless platform for you to invest and earn with low-cost, high efficiency, and ultimate experience. We aim to showcase what can be done on the strongest performing blockchain out there.

Challenges

Blockchain solves many real world problems, offers the best business models and economic structure for all of us.

Blockchain challenges

Blockchain systems have weaknesses in many domains, making mass adoption of blockchain a challenge.

    Main challenges in blockchain
  • Scalability
  • Centralization
  • Security
  • Energy consumption
  • Complexity

Scalability

SolanaLite's scalability ensures to process up to 65,000 transactions per second, and transaction cost remains less than $0.01.

Decentralization

SolanaLite is a decentralized blockchain system that does not rely on a central control point.

Security

SolanaLite blockchain system can operate as expected to defend itself from attacks, bugs, and other unforeseen issues.

Ecosystem

SolanaLite is designed to provide the best features of financial infrastructure to the world. Our ever-growing ecosystem of products encompasses all features of the blockchain experience.

Roadmap

2022 H1
  • Idea and research for largest, most advanced, and user friendly Web3 project and platforms
2022 H2
  • Team forming and project brainstorming
  • Complete Whitepaper
2023 H1
  • Develop smart contract
  • Website
  • SolanaLite (SLITE) token SALE
2023 H2
  • Listing SolanaLite (SLITE) on Raydium & Serum
  • Listing on Centralized Exchange (CEX)
2024 H1
  • Staking DApps
  • Wallet app support on IOS and Android
2024 H2
  • NFT non-fungible token marketplace launch
  • SolanaLite NFT collection launch
2025 H1
  • DEX Decentralised exchange lunch
  • DEX Decentralised exchange app on IOS and Android
2027 H1
  • Cross-chain communication mechanism
  • Release of next-generation Metaverse world
2026 H2
  • SolanaLite (SLITE) Launchpad for blockchain-based projects to raise capital
2026 H1
  • Lending platform lunch
  • Lending platform app on IOS and Android
2025 H2
  • Yield Farming platform lunch
  • Yield Farming platform app on IOS and Android
2023 Q2
  • Cross-chain communication mechanism
  • Release of next generation Metaverse world
2023 Q3
  • SolanaLite (SLITE) Launchpad for blockchain based projects to raise capital
2023 Q4
  • Lending platform lunch
  • Lending platform app on IOS and Android
2024 Q1
  • Yield Farming platform lunch
  • Yield Farming platform app on IOS and Android

Partners

FAQ

Browse through these FAQs to find answers to commonly raised questions. Please get in touch using the contact form below if you have any other questions.

  • GENERAL
  • LEGEAL
What is SolanaLite?

SolanaLite is a next-generation Web3 blockchain ecosystem built on Solana to support millions of users. It serves as a permissionless, cheap, and scalable protocol designed to provide the best properties of this financial infrastructure to a blockchain network. SolanaLite is entirely open-source, allowing anyone to interact with a user interface client, API, or directly with the smart contracts on the SOLANA network.

What wallets can I use with SolanaLite?

To connect to SolanaLite, you'll need an SPL wallet. SolanaLite currently supports Sollet.io, Ledger, Solong, Phantom, Math, Blocto, Solflare, and Bonfida wallets. SolanaLite will continue to integrate new wallets in the future.

Why build on Solana?

Solana stands out in blockchain with lightning-fast speeds of up to 65,000 transactions per second, 400ms block times, and less than $0.001 average transaction fees.

What is the price of SolanaLite in the token sale?

During the token sale period price of SolanaLite is $0.10 US dollars.

How can I particiate in SolanaLite token sale?

To particiate in SolanaLite token sale, you have to register here.

How much bonus do I get in the token sale?

A token sale is divided into four stages private presale, presale, sale, and last chance to buy. In the first stage, private presale investors will get a 20% bonus. In the second stage, 10% bonus, and Sale stage 5% bonus. Bonus is additional percent SolanaLite tokes of the purchase amount.

What cryptocurrencies can I use to purchase?

We will display payment information once the token sale period starts. You can pay with sixteen different cryptocurrencies, Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), Solana (SOL), Litecoin (LTC), Ripple (XRP), Stellar (XLM), Bitcoin Cash (BCH), Binance Coin (BEP20) (BNB), USD Tether (BEP20) (USDT), Tron (TRX), USD Coin (USDC), Dash (DASH), Binance USD (ERC20), (BUSD), Dogecoin (DOGE), Uniswap (UNI) and Chainlink (LINK). If you fund your account and purchase with any other cryptocurrencies except USDT, it will be converted to USDT at the time of purchase. We will show an estimated conversion rate at the time of purchase, and you will also incur a 0.50% transaction fee from CoinList for converting such funds.

When will tokens be received?

After the Token sale, SolanaLite will send it out to wallet addresses.

How can I stay up to date with SolanaLite news and updates?

Stay up-to-date with all official SolanaLite announcements by following SolanaLite on Twitter and subscribing to the SolanaLite newsletter. If you are looking for more information about announcements and technology, please join our highly active community on Telegram.

Is SolanaLite safe?

SolanaLite is 100% decentralised, 100% non-custodial, 100% on-chain and open source. All transactions are purely peer-to-peer with no involvement from a centralized operator. SolanaLite protocol never has access to your private keys at any point.

Is there any risk?

No platform can be considered entirely risk-free. Every possible step is taken to minimize the risk as much as possible. The risks related to the SolanaLite platform are the smart contract risk (risk of a bug within the protocol code) and liquidation risk (risk on the collateral liquidation process).

For any additional information and resources about SolanaLite feel free to contact us.

Please get in touch using the contact form below if you have any other questions.
